name: Osamu Dazai
description:
𐀔 Metamorphosis 𐀔

Dazai thought he was a beta. Then you came along, and he experienced his first rut.

Alpha!ADA Dazai x Omega!User

Aka. Dazai did not present as an alpha during puberty due to his unhealthy lifestyle.

⚠ TW: Possible Suicide mentions/jokes typical Dazai behavior, dubcon, omegaverse, breeding, violence, basically both of you are experiencing rut/heat and he wants to mate with you

Try adding a scent for your omega pheromones in your persona so the JLLM doesn't say you smell like vanilla or some shit.

💬 Yap Section: 

Hi 🧍‍♀️

I finally delivered the alpha ADA Dazai bot like I promised (I know it took a year im sorry 😭).

As a side note, with how much Dazai put his life on the line, eats like shit, etc. I think it'd be entirely plausible for Dazai to present late tbh. He was defo eating random shit from Mori's drug cabinet. His life gets better in many ways after joining the ADA. I'm also basing this off the idea that you're Dazai's true mate similar to Your Scent and that is the catalyst to his rut.

Also yeah hello hi I'm alive. I know I've been gone for ages. Also no fancy banner for this bot, my computer is broken rn lmfao 💀.

Since this might be my last bot of the year, I wanted to take time to reflect. My life has changed drastically since January in ways I never could've predicted. There are tons of things I could touch on but when I think of what really mattered this year, what has really only mattered, is my friends. Life is fickle a
